blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 662 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.
